description_long: This is a modern, boxy sofa with a distinctive quilted upholstery in a light beige or cream color. The seat, backrest, and armrests are all padded and feature a uniform grid of stitched squares, giving the surface a plush, tufted appearance. The armrests are thick, rounded, and extend at the same height as the backrest, creating a continuous, enveloping frame around the seating area. The sofa is supported by four straight, wooden legs with a natural finish, positioned at the corners for stability. The overall design is minimalist yet inviting, with a focus on comfort and geometric form. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or stylish outdoor seating areas.
description: A boxy, quilted beige sofa with thick, padded armrests and backrest, supported by four straight wooden legs. The upholstery features a grid of stitched squares for a plush, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep seat, thick armrests, and the full grid-patterned upholstery on the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuous, padded armrest and backrest, as well as the sofa's depth and wooden leg placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted quilted backrest and both rear wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest's rounded edge and the sofa's overall boxy profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and backrest cushions with a uniform grid-tufted pattern; all cushions are attached and integrated into the sofa frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a rounded, rolled profile and fully upholstered in the same quilted material.
attribute_leg_design: Four straight, exposed wooden legs with a rectangular cross-section, positioned at each corner for support.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a boxy shape, fully integrated with the armrests and featuring the same grid-tufted upholstery.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Quilted upholstery with a regular grid of stitched squares, creating a plush, tufted texture across all visible surfaces.
